app.name: Another Me Agent
system.prompt: You are a friendly assistant. Please answer the user's question.
tool.fetch.description: Fetches content from a given URL. It can simplify HTML content or return raw data.
tool.fetch.arg.url: The URL to fetch content from.
tool.fetch.arg.max_length: Maximum number of characters to return from the content (default: 10000).
tool.fetch.arg.start_index: Starting character index for fetching content (default: 0). Useful for pagination.
tool.fetch.arg.raw: If true, returns the raw content (e.g., HTML) instead of trying to simplify it (default: false).
tool.fetch.arg.ignore_robots_txt: If true, ignores the site's robots.txt rules (default: false). Use responsibly.
tool.fetch.arg.user_agent: Custom User-Agent string to use for the request. Defaults based on context (autonomous vs manual).
tool.fetch.arg.proxy_url: Optional proxy URL to use for the request (e.g., 'http://user:pass@host:port'). Uses environment proxy if unset.
tool.fetch.arg.is_manual_request: Indicates if the request is triggered manually by a user action (affects default User-Agent and robots.txt check behavior).
tool.gui.screenshot.description: Capture a screenshot of the default desktop, format like: data:image/png;base64,...
tool.gui.move_mouse.description: Move the mouse to the specified coordinates.
tool.gui.drag.description: Drag the mouse to the specified coordinates.
tool.gui.scroll.description: Scroll the mouse to the specified coordinates.
tool.gui.scroll_relative.description: Scroll the mouse to the specified coordinates relative to the current position.
tool.gui.scroll_direction.description: Scroll the mouse to the specified direction.
